---
name: "Book Errata"
about: "Wrong content, typo, broken link, or stale code sample in the book."
title: "[Errata] "
labels: ["errata"]
assignees: ["fluhartyml"]
---

## Which page

Copy the page path from the header bar at the top of the page in the reader app, e.g.
`Part III The User Interface/Book 04 Gestures And Input`

## Which line(s)

Every paragraph in the book is line-numbered in the left gutter. List the line number(s) where the problem is.

## What the book says now

Quote the exact text as it reads today.

## What it should say

Your correction — as close to drop-in as you can make it.

## Source / reason (optional)

If you have a citation (Apple docs URL, Swift Evolution proposal, WWDC session, another book), drop it here. If you just know from experience, say so.

## Platform / version (if relevant)

If the erratum is about behavior on a specific OS or Xcode version, name it.
